title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Luffy, Big Mom, Unknown person #10, Queen, Unknown person #11 as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Straw hat! Why did you come here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not going to say something ridiculous like defeating Kaido, are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not just Kaido. You, the commanders and Crochi and his subordinates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've come to kick all your guy's asses!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be so full of yourself just for bringing a few hundred people!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are thousands of intruders going into the castle through the rear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai that we should have arrested in the flower capital!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and adding to the pirates, the former Shitchibukai Trafalfar Law

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And their force just keeps increasing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore for some reason "Marco the Phoenix" and Charlotte Perospero..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: to all the drunkard of Onigaashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Tonight's festival is cancelled! Get your weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go! We're going to take back wand country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard you strawhat! Come! I accept your challenge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show you the strength of the world's strongest power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we are going to fight, we better do it in a large place

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There are more differences with that day

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We thought that you wouldn't be able to fight inside the dome if you become a dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've brought all the warriors from our country

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: As dancing flowers from a clear sky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: An apparition in the dark night

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
